creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hm,

I checked your website.

The problem I see at the moment is that there are no support/consulting 
offers for FreeBSD on your site. The only thing I could fine is a search 
option for FreeBSD.  But if I do a search, I get zero results (no matter 
what search criteria I am using).

Until this changes, it does not make sense to add this to our consultant 
list.

Regards.


jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
